config.footerText: We are a conglomerate committed to sustainable development, transparency, and quality. Our diverse portfolio drives national progress.

slides.subtitle: WELCOME TO EXPRO GROUP
slides.title: Legacy of Excellence
slides.description: Leading the nation with sustainable industrial growth and unwavering commitment to quality.

slides.subtitle: INNOVATION & TECHNOLOGY
slides.title: Driving Future Industries
slides.description: Utilizing cutting-edge technology to revolutionize manufacturing and service sectors.

slides.subtitle: HUMAN CAPITAL
slides.title: Empowering People
slides.description: Creating opportunities and fostering a skilled workforce for national development.

about.introText:
Since its inception, Expro Group has consistently achieved strong progress in the industrial and commercial sectors. Through the policy of recruiting skilled manpower, creating employment, and valuing employees as members of the Expro family, the organization has fostered a permanent and humane work environment.

Our strategy focuses on sustainable development, transparency, and maintaining the highest standards of quality in all our subsidiaries.
about.chairmanMessage: Since its inception, Expro Group has been moving forward with a deep sense of responsibility toward people, society, and the nation. We believe in creating value that lasts for generations.
about.mdMessage: As the Managing Director of Expro Group, I take immense pride in stating that under the visionary leadership of our Chairman, we have established ourselves as the embodiment of excellence.
about.coordinatorMessage: As a Coordinator of Expro Group, it is an honor for me to work at the center of effective implementation of the profound vision set forth by our Chairman and Managing Director.
about.vision: To be the leading, most trusted, and socially responsible corporate group in Bangladesh.

news.title: Grand Opening of New Textile Unit
news.content: Expro Group is proud to announce the expansion of its textile division with a new state-of-the-art facility.

news.title: Award for Best Exporter 2024
news.content: We have been recognized by the Ministry of Commerce for our outstanding contribution to national exports.

companies.name: Expro Bangladesh PLC
companies.description: The flagship entity leading the national industrial sector with innovation.

companies.name: Expro Welfare Foundation
companies.description: Dedicated to social welfare, education, and humanity across the nation.

companies.name: Expro Global Child Academy
companies.description: Shaping the future generation with world-class education systems.

companies.name: Expro Energy
companies.description: Renewable energy solutions for a greener tomorrow.

services.title: Quality Assurance
services.description: We maintain international standards in all production lines.

services.title: Global Logistics
services.description: Efficient supply chain management across borders.

services.title: 24/7 Support
services.description: Dedicated customer service for our partners.
